message:
security(node): centralize constant-time comparison for MAC/hash verification

Refactors all hash and MAC equality checks to use constant-time
comparison, preventing timing side-channel attacks on security-
sensitive comparisons:

- control_epoch.rs: Add inline ct_eq_inline() and replace direct
  event_mac == expected with constant-time comparison
- root_pointer.rs: Delegate to crate::security::constant_time::ct_eq
  instead of reimplementing locally
- transparency_verifier.rs: Use ct_eq for pinned root hash lookups
- constraint_compiler.rs: Use ct_eq for policy snapshot hash and
  predicate expression hash verification
- proof_verifier.rs: Use ct_eq for proof hash comparisons

This eliminates the pattern of using == on hex-encoded hashes that
could leak information about which bytes match via timing analysis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
